meaning: v.(运动竞赛、桥牌等的)重赛
examples: Duff said he would be demanding a rematch.
In the rematch the Japanese won by two miles.
But only a few months later, Ali won a rematch and regained the title.
The first match at Ibrox finished 3-3 before United triumphed 1-0 in the rematch at Tannadice.
But the marquee race is between Walker and Barrett, a rematch of the 2010 governor's race.
